title: diplophyllum crista-galli
intro: Diplophyllum crista-galli, also known as the Crested Diplophyllum, is a species of leafy liverwort that belongs to the family Jungermanniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Diplophyllum crista-galli include its ability to support liver health, improve digestion, and reduce inflammation. It can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for herbal use, or it may be dried and encapsulated for consumption as a dietary supplement.
